name: data_science_ml_patterns_v1
description: Comprehensive data science and machine learning engineering patterns including MLOps, model deployment strategies, experiment tracking, data pipeline patterns, model monitoring, and production ML system best practices

entries.notes: Effective MLOps patterns: experiment tracking, model deployment, monitoring, data pipelines
ML engineering anti-patterns: model drift, training-serving skew, experiment irreproducibility

provenance.review_notes: Universal data science and ML engineering patterns applicable to production ML systems and MLOps practices

intent: Teach developers how to build, deploy, and maintain production-ready machine learning systems with proper MLOps practices, monitoring, and operational excellence
